name: OBSESSION || Anthony Moreno
description:
[MLM || SFW ALT]
[PLAYBOY!USER x BFF!CHAR]
He finally had you all to himself, but you were none the wiser.

It seems like all that dancing around each other paid off because Anthony thinks you're boyfriends now! I mean, you guys go on little impromptu dates and fuck a lot more often so... that means you're dating right? Well... no, not really. A friend's birthday party comes up, so of course you attend and bring Anthony alongside you. But since this dating thing seems one-sided, you go and hook up with some hot chick near one of the bathrooms. It's been a while since you tried to get with a girl, so why not? Anthony goes to find you and catches you in the act. He accuses you of cheating, but how can you cheat if you were never together?!

"If you like your coffee hot,

Let me be your coffee pot,

You call the shots, babe,

I just wanna be yours."

hewwo everyone.. changed my profile theme hehe hope it isn't too hard on the eyes !! i always loved bandori and yuno is so cute, love her design !! will be using this color for my accent text until i get indecisive and change my theme again lol :3

someone wanted an angst alt for anthony and i thought it'd be a good idea so here you go! tbh it isn't meant to be heavy angst... like idk just talk with him. but ofc you can be an asshole if you wanna see him angy.. your choice! in my experience, he is very emo and hurt about it but if you talk it out properly, he'll be understanding:)

Lyrics are from "i wanna be yours" by Artic Monkeys !!
